category_sources: Official homepage describes iftop as bandwidth usage display for an interface.
source_facts.description says iftop displays an interface's bandwidth usage.
display_name_sources: Official homepage and source repository are named iftop.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the upstream project page and best official documentation surface identified.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; search found Paul Warren's GitLab project for iftop with official clone URLs under the same pdw identity as the upstream homepage.
tags_sources: source_facts.description says it displays interface bandwidth usage.
source_facts.executables lists iftop as a CLI executable.
